author: anon-59ff128d
content: Delivered: Replaced byte-offset-based to_lowercase() slicing with regex::escape() + (?i) delegation for case-insensitive literal matching. Fixed both matcher.rs (is_match, replace) and engine.rs (apply_transform). Case-insensitive literals now construct a Regex internally, which handles Unicode simple case folding correctly. Updated Turkish İ test to reflect correct simple-fold behavior. All 508 tests pass.
